task: When running 'bun run dev' and inspecting the homepage in Chrome, there is one error and one warning. The error is: 'Content Security Policy of your site blocks the use of eval in JavaScript.' The warning is: 'Deprecated feature used; the Shared Storage API is deprecated and will be removed in a future release.'
